title: Subitem Locations display on Map Widget
excerpt:
Hello, 
I am trying to display locations on a map widget. If I have multiple locations per item and dedicate each location as a subitem, can I have this appear on a map? 
Thank you

posts.author: KyleD (Kyle DeNorscia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am trying to display locations on a map widget. If I have multiple locations per item and dedicate each location as a subitem, can I have this appear on a map?

Thank you
